hero.title: About Us
hero.desc: The most popular and trusted traditional medicine clinic in the city.

bento.label: ☆ ABOUT US
bento.title: The Highest Level of Comfort, Healing and Service
bento.desc: At An Binh Clinic, we combine premium traditional medicine with attention to detail. Whether it's a private therapy session tailored just for you, or a relaxing herbal remedy routine — we take care of everything, so you can enjoy every moment.

why.label: ✦ Why Choose Us
why.title: Rooted in Tradition, Perfected for Modern Healing.

f1.title: Master Herbalists
f1.desc: Decades of classical training — every diagnosis is rooted in time-proven protocols.

f2.title: Personalised Care
f2.desc: Every plan is built for you — targeting your body's unique needs.

f3.title: Premium Ingredients
f3.desc: 80+ varieties sourced from certified highland farms, prepared using traditional methods.

f4.title: Holistic Approach
f4.desc: We treat the root, not just the symptom — balancing body, mind, and energy.

journey.label: ● Our Journey
journey.title: Over 30 years of healing, guided by ancestral wisdom and modern care.
journey.desc: An Binh was founded in the early 1990s by Dr. Nguyen Phuoc Binh, a renowned physician trained in classical Eastern medicine. What began as a modest family clinic grew — generation by generation — into one of the city's most trusted institutions for holistic care.

vision.label: ● Our vision
vision.title: A future where traditional medicine is accessible to every family, at every stage of life.
vision.desc: We envision An Binh as more than a clinic — a living bridge between ancient healing knowledge and the needs of modern life. By combining classical diagnostics with contemporary wellness practices, we strive to make holistic care not just effective, but truly welcoming.

mission.label: ● Our mission
mission.title: To honour the wisdom of traditional medicine while serving each patient with empathy, precision, and care.
mission.desc: Our mission is grounded in three principles: personalised care that sees the whole person, ethical sourcing of every herb and remedy, and a deep commitment to education — sharing the knowledge of Eastern medicine with each patient and the wider community.

services.label: ♥ SERVICES
services.title: What we offer?
services.desc: From a private diagnosis to a scheduled multi-month healing route to an accessible wellness check — we've got the perfect option for you.

private.label: ⚚ PRIVATE THERAPY
private.title:
Tailored Private Therapies
and treatments
private.desc: Enjoy a personalized healing journey in our VIP relaxing rooms. These sessions offer complete flexibility — targeting exactly your pain points or energy blocks at your own pace.
private.highlight:
Total privacy and comfort,
optimised for clinical recovery.

scheduled.label: ⚚ SCHEDULED CARE
scheduled.title:
Structured
healing programmes
scheduled.desc: Our multi-session treatment plans are designed for conditions that require sustained, progressive care. Each follow-up builds on the last — measurable improvement, every step.
scheduled.highlight:
In-depth protocols tailored
for chronic health conditions.

herbal.label: ⚚ FROM THE SOURCE
herbal.title:
Handcrafted
herbal prescriptions
herbal.desc: Every herbal blend is prescribed and prepared on-site by our herbalists using over 80 premium varieties sourced from certified highland farms — dried, processed, and dispensed with care.
herbal.highlight:
80+ premium herb varieties,
sourced and prepared in-house.

acupuncture.label: ⚚ ANCIENT PRECISION
acupuncture.title:
Acupuncture
and acupressure therapy
acupuncture.desc: Practiced for over 2,000 years, our acupuncture and acupressure treatments restore the body's natural energy flow — relieving pain, reducing stress, and supporting deep healing from within.
acupuncture.highlight:
Trusted by millions across
Asia for over two millennia.

nutrition.label: ⚚ WHOLE-BODY CARE
nutrition.title:
Nutrition
and physical therapy
nutrition.desc: We take a whole-body approach — combining Eastern dietary therapy with targeted physical rehabilitation. Our specialists guide you through corrective exercises and restorative nutrition plans.
nutrition.highlight:
Combining Eastern diet theory
with modern physiotherapy.

community.label: ⚚ TOGETHER WE HEAL
community.title:
Community
health support
community.desc: We believe healing should be accessible to all. Through subsidised consultations, community workshops, and outreach programmes, we bring traditional medicine care to those who need it most.
community.highlight:
Free workshops every month
for the local community.

cta.title: Ready to Begin Your Healing Journey?
cta.desc: Experience the perfect balance of traditional wisdom and modern care at An Binh Clinic.
